auth.subtitle: Umngane wakho wokuphepha ohambweni lwamatekisi eNingizimu Afrika
auth.agreeTerms: Ngokuqhubeka, uyavuma Imigomo Yethu Yesevisi neNqubomgomo Yobumfihlo
auth.smsHelper: Sizokuthumela ikhodi yokuqinisekisa yezinombolo ezingu-6 nge-SMS
auth.invalidNumberDesc: Sicela ufake inombolo yocingo efanele yaseNingizimu Afrika.
auth.couldntSendDesc: Sicela uhlole ukuxhumeka kwakho bese uzama futhi.

otp.title: Qinisekisa inombolo yakho
otp.subtitle: Faka ikhodi yezinombolo ezingu-6 esiyithumele ku
otp.failedDesc: Ikhodi engavumelekile noma ephelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela uzame futhi.
otp.incompleteDesc: Sicela ufake ikhodi ephelele yezinombolo ezingu-6.

profile.setupSubtitle: Imininingwane embalwa ukuze sikwenzele isipiliyoni se-Haibo sakho
profile.handleHint: Kuboniswa okuthunyelwayo kwakho nokuphawula esikhundleni senombolo yakho yocingo
profile.photoRecognize: Kwenza kube lula kubashayeli nabathengisi ukukubona
profile.permissionNeededDesc: Nika imvume yokuthola izithombe ukuze ulayishe isithombe sephrofayili.

emergency.title: Isimo esiphuthumayo
emergency.locationShared: Indawo yakho yabelwanwe nabaphenduli bezimo eziphuthumayo
emergency.contactHint: Baziswa uma uvusa i-SOS. Ungangeza abanye kamuva.

fares.title: Izindleko Zamatekisi
fares.searchPlaceholder: Sesha lapho uvela noma uya khona

ranks.noPhotos: Azikho izithombe okwamanje — yiba owokuqala ukusiza abagibeli bathole le renki.

rating.title: Linganisa Uhambo Lwakho
rating.subtitle: Siza ukuthuthukisa ukuphepha kwawo wonke umuntu
rating.linked: Impendulo yakho ithunyelwe futhi ixhunywe kurekhodi yomshayeli.
rating.incompleteDesc: Sicela ulinganise umshayeli, ulinganise irenki, bese ufaka inombolo yepuleti letekisi.
rating.photoUploadFailedDesc: Sizothumela isilinganiso sakho ngaphandle kwesithombe. Ungengeza izithombe kamuva.

share.title: Yabelana
share.watermarkNote: Kwabelwana ngebhrendu ye-Haibo! nelinki yokulayisha i-app
share.shareFooter: Yabelana ngale reel nabangane nomndeni wakho

settings.title: Izilungiselelo
settings.subtitle: Phatha izaziso, ubumfihlo, nezilungiselelo ze-akhawunti.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Khiya futhi ufihle — ukusulwa ezinsukwini ezingu-30 (POPIA §24)
settings.signOutConfirm: Uzodinga ukuphinda ungene ukuze ufinyelele i-akhawunti yakho.
settings.deleteConfirm: Lokhu kuzokhiya unomphela i-akhawunti yakho, kufihle iphrofayili yakho, bese kuhlela idatha esele ukuthi isulwe ezinsukwini ezingu-30. Lokhu akuguquleki.
settings.deleteConfirm2: Thepha Susa ngezansi ukuvala unomphela i-akhawunti yakho ye-Haibo!.

onboarding.safetyDesc: I-SOS ecindezela kanye nokwabelana ngendawo okubukhoma kukugcina uvikelekile ohambweni ngalunye.
onboarding.findRanksDesc: Thola amarenki namatekisi imizila yonke eNingizimu Afrika ngezibuyekezo zangempela.
onboarding.communityDesc: Yabelana ngamahamba, izinto ezilahlekile, nezexwayiso zokuphepha nabagibeli abaseduze kwakho.
onboarding.smartPayDesc: Izinkokhelo ezingenanhlawulo kubashayeli namarenki — ezisheshayo, ezivikelekile, nezilandelwayo.
onboarding.privacyDesc: I-Haibo! iyi-app yokuphepha, ngakho sidlala ngemininingwane yakho ngokucophelela. Ngaphambi kokuba uqale, sicela ufunde ukuthi siluqoqa kanjani ulwazi lwakho futhi silukhusele ngaphansi kwe-POPIA yaseNingizimu Afrika.
onboarding.acceptTerms: Ngifundile futhi ngiyamukela iNqubomgomo Yobumfihlo neMigomo Yesevisi, futhi ngiyaqonda ukuthi isici se-SOS se-Haibo! akuyona eyokuthatha indawo yamasevisi aphuthumayo.

menu.title: Imenyu
menu.subtitle: Amasevisi, amathuluzi okuphepha ne-akhawunti yakho
menu.lostFoundHint: Bika noma ufune izinto ezishiywe ematekisini
menu.driverDashboardHint: Ukulandelela i-GPS, Haibo Pay, izenzo ezisheshayo
menu.becomeDriverHint: Bhalisa itekisi lakho ukwamukela i-Haibo Pay
menu.signInHint: Gcina abaxhumana nabo futhi uvule i-Haibo Pay
